{{Quote|Both bear the weapons of Jeedai. But scum runs with scum. Perhaps they are ''rogue'' Jeedai—or scavengers? In either case, we are honor bound to defend the ''legacy'' from such as them.|Liaan Lah to Nei Rin, regarding Cade Skywalker and Shado Vao|<ref name="Legacy 12">[[Legacy (2006) 12|''Legacy'' (2006) 12]]</ref>}}
'''Liaan Lah''', along with [[Choka Skell]], was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warrior assigned to protect [[Master Shaper]] [[Nei Rin]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]].<ref name="CSWE" />
